## Local Workbench Contents

- `paper/RampMetersOnTrial.pdf`: local reference copy for review convenience.
- `data/analysis_spreadsheets/original_xls`: original Excel 97-2003 analysis workbooks found in the paper folder.
- `data/analysis_spreadsheets/modernized_xlsx`: LibreOffice-converted modern `.xlsx` copies of the analysis workbooks.
- `documentation/appendices_original_doc`: original appendix Word documents documenting calculations and methodology.
- `documentation/appendices_text_extracts`: text extracts from the appendix documents for search and review.
- `documentation/PAPER_FIRST_VALIDATION.md`: summary of the paper-to-assets match.
- `documentation/SOURCE_BOUNDARY.md`: package inclusion and exclusion rationale.
- `metadata/SPREADSHEET_MANIFEST.csv`: workbook sheet/dimension summary.
- `metadata/DOCUMENTATION_MANIFEST.csv`: appendix documentation summary.
- `metadata/EXCLUDED_LOCAL_FILES.csv`: nonarchival files intentionally left out.

- No exclusions were recorded by the package builder.

## Remaining Work

- Uncertainty: the package contains the local TH169 derived analysis workbooks and method appendices found in the paper folder, not raw MnDOT detector feeds or every corridor used in the article.
- Restriction reason: none identified for the staged derived analysis files; drafts, correspondence, presentations, referee files, and other nonarchival materials were excluded.
